(images at ×1000 magnification, scale bar: 10 μm). (E-F) CFU in lungs (E) and spleen (F) were determined at three weeks after infection by plating right lung
and spleen homogenates onto 7H10 plates. (G) The percentage of lung area covered by inflammatory lesions relative to total lung area was measured using
image-j software. Data shown are representative of six mice per group. Data collected are expressed as the mean ± SD. (* P < 0.05; ** P < 0.01; *** P < 0.001).
